claim: A simple 3-ring volvelle (6 prefixes x 26 roots x 8 suffixes) with per-section root-cartridge swap reproduces 4 of 7 Voynich statistical properties including vowel-section chi-square coupling (90% vs real 79%). It fails Zipf exponent (0.18 vs 0.65) and hapax ratio (0.24 vs 0.70) by large margins. The vowel-section coupling Brain-V treated as its strongest positive structural finding (H-BV-VOWEL-01) is NOT uniquely diagnostic of meaning: a content-free volvelle mechanism produces it trivially via section-specific cartridges.
evidence_for: Volvelle vowel-section coupling rate 90% (54/60 skeletons at p<0.01) vs real 79%
Currier A/B divergence same order of magnitude (0.013 vs 0.018)
Shuffle-test delta sign matches (both near zero/negative)
evidence_against: Zipf exponent 0.18 vs real 0.65 - huge mismatch
Hapax ratio 0.24 vs real 0.70 - real Voynich is 3x more lexically diverse
3-ring volvelle may be too simple; a richer volvelle or volvelle+content hybrid could close the gap
Only aggregate coupling was tested; specific-pattern enrichments (e.g. H-BV-PLANT-01 _.oii at 4.84x on plant folios) may not be reproducible by random cartridges
test: Extend the simulator to test whether _.oii enrichment on plant-ID folios is reproduced by random cartridges. If not, volvelle fails on the sharper test.
test_threshold: If synthetic produces 4x+ plant-folio _.oii enrichment: volvelle still viable. If synthetic cannot produce pattern-to-subset enrichment: H-BV-PLANT-01 becomes the discriminating evidence.

tests_run.details: 4/7 matches on aggregate stats. Volvelle reproduces vowel-section chi-square coupling (79% real vs 90% synth) which was Brain-V's strongest positive signal. Volvelle fails Zipf (0.18 vs 0.65) and hapax (0.24 vs 0.70).
tests_run.confidence_change: initial 0.85 - high confidence the volvelle-can-produce-coupling result is real

tests_remaining: Pattern-specific enrichment test: does volvelle reproduce _.oii at 4.84x on plant folios?
Richer volvelle variants (more rings, non-uniform sampling) to see if Zipf can be matched
Evaluate volvelle+content hybrid: volvelle with real-word injection
reasoning: Major caveat on H-BV-VOWEL-01. The vowel-section coupling Brain-V published as its strongest positive finding is reproducible by a trivial random-cartridge volvelle with no content at all. Same disease as H-BV-NULL-01 diagnosed for coverage: the signal exists but is not diagnostic of meaning. H-BV-PLANT-01 may still survive since it tests specific-pattern-to-specific-folio-subset enrichment which this volvelle test does not address.
